arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool switch focus to affordable replacement for Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Liverpool have added Bologna defender Sam Beukema to their list of potential transfer targets in defence amid doubts over Virgil van Dijk’s long-term future at Anfield. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Liverpool have a number of centre-backs on their radar at the moment, with Beukema being lined up […] The post Exclusive: Liverpool switch focus to affordable replacement for Virgil van Dijk appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Premier League games for today set to go ahead as planned despite Storm Bert - with Man United fans in travel chaos after Manchester Piccadilly's severe disruptions, while Liverpool supporters head to Southampton
arts.sum: Storm Bert is wreaking havoc across the UK, causing severe disruptions that are significantly impacting Premier League travel plans for fans and teams gearing up for this afternoon's fixtures.
